# Vendored Frontend Dependencies

These files are vendored so the Python desktop app can run without loading CDN assets:

- `plotly-2.35.2.min.js`
  - Source: https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js
  - Project: https://github.com/plotly/plotly.js
  - License: MIT
- `html2canvas-1.4.1.min.js`
  - Source: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/html2canvas@1.4.1/dist/html2canvas.min.js
  - Project: https://github.com/niklasvh/html2canvas
  - License: MIT
